title: Reliable Create - Technical, Food, Automation!
description: The vanilla-like create, with some tweaks and QoL mods. Available free public server!
body:
**Welcome to the Steampunk styled modpack!**

Tasks of this modpack (finished):
- Make server vanilla like, but with so many content. Its modpack have 250+ mods, but its optimized as well.
- Host a public server of modpack.

<details>
<summary>PC/Laptop requirements</summary>
Its requirements - our real test.

Recommended:
- GTX 1050 Ti or newer
- i5 10500H (or ryzen 5 2600)
- 6 GB RAM allocated to game. (Ferrnitcore is our saver)
- 3 GB of disk space.

Minimal (tested at HP 15-DA0237UR):
- NVIDIA MX110
- Intel Pentium Silver N5000
- 2.5-3.0 GB allocated to game.
- 3 GB of disk space.
Only minimal settings -> view distance: not more 4-6, simulation: recommended 6, other settings not important, fast preset is `FAST`
</details>
<details>

<summary>How i can play with my friend without ANY software/mod?</summary>

# Server was closed due no player online.

  We're hosting a free public server what alreadly added into your server list with this modpack!
You can join to server and play for free with your friend, server has no technical limits.

Joining to our public server you agree the rules:
1. Respect all players.  
2. No griefing.  
3. No cheating or hacking.  
4. Keep chat friendly.  
5. Have fun!
</details>


<details>
<summary>Known issues</summary>
  
- Shaders works well, but not at late of the game. Create is overloading many shaders and its causing big FPS drop.
- One of apple pie can cause crash.
- Mob can spawn around player. (Semi-fixed)
  
</details>



Step into a realm where innovation meets elegance in our exclusive Fabric 1.20.1 modpack - an immersive playground built for private SMPs(!). Inspired by the ingenious mechanics of Create, this modpack ushers you into the Steampunk Era, a world where intricate contraptions and dashing aesthetics fuse into a symphony of creativity and adventure.

Imagine sprawling landscapes dotted with fantastical machinery, where every gear and piston sings a ballad of meticulous craftsmanship and rebellious style. Here, the industrial pulse is reimagined with a modern, avant-garde twist melding art, technology, and a dash of derring-do into every meticulously designed module.

Whether you're constructing monumental structures, engineering mind-blowing automations, or simply exploring the frontier of a beautifully transformed Minecraft universe, the **Steampunk Revolution** is your invitation to redefine what's possible. Embrace the fusion of raw industrial power with creative finesse, and let every moment on your private SMP become a testament to your pioneering spirit.

### Some features at list (1-10)

1. **Mechanical Mastery**  
   *Unleash your inner engineer by building intricate contraptions using the Create mod suite. Design everything from automated factories to ingenious gear-driven elevators that breathe life into your steampunk world.*

2. **Dynamic Rail Systems**  
   *Lay down complex rail networks with Create Railways Refuelled and Create: Steam 'n' Rails. Seamlessly transport goods and passengers across your sprawling industrial landscapes with style and efficiency.*

3. **Immersive Architecture & Interiors**  
   *Transform your builds into grand factories, opulent mansions, or secretive laboratories using Create: Interiors and Create: Deepfried. Every structure becomes a masterpiece of Victorian-inspired design and industrial functionality.*

4. **Atmospheric Visuals & Audio**  
   *Elevate your experience with Iris Shaders and AmbientSounds. Bask in realistic lighting, dramatic shadows, and immersive ambient audio that perfectly capture the essence of a steam-powered era.*

5. **Enhanced Performance**  
   *Experience smooth gameplay with performance-enhancing mods like Sodium and Lithium. Enjoy a lag-free adventure where every mechanical marvel and exploration runs flawlessly on Fabric 1.20.1.*

6. **Culinary & Farming Innovations**  
   *Satisfy your hunger for both adventure and gastronomy with Farmer's Delight. Discover new recipes and farming mechanics that add a delectable twist to your industrial exploits.*

7. **Advanced Computing & Automation**  
   *Harness the power of CC: Tweaked to bring automation and computing to your steampunk creations. Program intricate systems and digital devices that complement your analog ingenuity.*

8. **Intuitive Inventory & Crafting Management**  
   *Streamline your creative process with Roughly Enough Items (REI) and Mod Menu. Quickly access recipes, manage your inventory, and effortlessly integrate new mods into your evolving steampunk empire.*

9. **Adventurous Exploration**  
   *Uncover hidden secrets in mysterious ruins, abandoned factories, and enigmatic dungeons. Each journey is a blend of danger and discovery, waiting to reveal the untold lore of the Stylepunk Era.*

10. **Seamless Mod Integration**  
    *Enjoy a fully integrated mod ecosystem where every component—from essential APIs to detailed decorative mods—works in harmony. This ensures a cohesive, balanced, and breathtaking steampunk experience on every level.*

---

### **Some technical info**

| Mod Name                 |      Version       |                           Category/Description                            |
|--------------------------|:------------------:|----------------------------------------------------------------------------:|
| **Create**               | 0.5.1-j-build.1631 | Mechanical engineering and automation with a unique stylepunk twist         |
| **Sodium**               | 0.5.11+mc1.20.1    | Performance optimization for smoother graphics and higher FPS              |
| **Lithium**              | 0.11.3             | Enhances server and client performance to streamline gameplay               |
| **AmbientSounds**        | 6.1.4              | Immersive audio that sets the mood for your industrial adventures            |
| **CC: Tweaked**          | 1.114.3            | Advanced computing and automation for digital contraptions                 |
| **Fabric API**           | 0.92.3+1.20.1      | Core library enabling mod compatibility and enhanced features               |
| **Mod Menu**             | 7.2.2              | Intuitive interface for browsing and managing your installed mods            |
| **Farmer's Delight**      | 1.20.1-2.2.5+refab | Culinary and farming improvements to complement your steampunk creations     |
| **Better End**           | 4.0.11             | Revamps the End dimension with new biomes, structures, and challenges        |
| **Roughly Enough Items** | 12.1.785           | In-game recipe viewer and inventory management tool for streamlined crafting |
| **Polymorph**            | 0.49.8+1.20.1      | Adds transformative abilities for a dynamic gameplay experience              |

Provided as exist, no support guaranteed.
